title: 150ml Silicone Mould Release Spray, Mold Release Spray, for Epoxy Resin, AB Resin, Candle, and Soap Molds, Includes a Brush, Easy Demoulding, no Residue, Extending Mold Life
features: Easy Mold Release: Mold release spray comes with an included brush for even application. Whether it's intricate silicone molds or large resin pieces, it allows for flawless mold release without damage.

No-Residue Formula: The spray is fine and even, forming an ultra-thin protective film on the mold surface. It leaves no oil stains or marks after demolding, ensuring a mirror-smooth surface and eliminating the need for secondary cleaning.
Extended Mold Life: Mould release spray's formula is gentle on hands and won't damage silicone or other mold materials. It effectively extends the life of your mold, ensuring every piece is flawless.

Easy to Use: The 150ml portable bottle is easy to use, just spray and go. With excellent coverage, a small amount can cover a large area, and one bottle lasts for a long time, providing you with a cost-effective mold release solution.

Widely Compatible: Compatible with a variety of common mold materials, including silicone, epoxy resin, AB resin, rubber, concrete, and candle and soap molds. Silicone mould release spray is a great tool for crafting, model making, industrial casting, and home DIY projects.
description: Say goodbye to mold release worries and let every creation come to life! Product Name: Silicone Release Spray For Resin Moulds Set Contents: 150ml Silicone release spray*1 Brush*1 Product Advantages: 1. Innovative brush tip for even application: The soft brush tip allows precise and even coverage of the mold surface, ensuring perfect release in every corner. 2. Highly effective, long-lasting release: For multi-layer castings or molds used over time, this spray can effectively reduce the need for re-application, making it economical and efficient. Instructions: 1. Shake the spray thoroughly before use. 2. In a well-ventilated area, spray from a distance of approximately 15-20 cm from the mold surface, ensuring coverage of every detail. 3. Wait approximately 1-2 minutes for the solvent to evaporate, leaving a dry release film. 4. Pour your material (resin, concrete, wax, etc.) and allow it to cure for easy release. Tip: For best results and to conserve usage, we recommend using the included brush to evenly apply the spray to every corner and intricate detail of the mold. Storage method: Store sealed in a cool place, avoid high temperature exposure.
